---
title: "Bio: Dominik Tomaszuk"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    format-links: false
    pagetitle: Bio
    title-block-style: none
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<style>
#quarto-document-content > header#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}
</style>

# Bio

[Download the PDF biography](bio.pdf){.hero-button}

The Bio page includes a short profile on the web and links to the full downloadable biography.
:::

## About

{{< include _partials/about-content.qmd >}}

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
## Contact

{{< include _partials/contact-content.qmd >}}

{{< include _partials/about-extended-content.qmd >}}

## Research

{{< include _partials/research-overview-content.qmd >}}

## Publications

{{< include _partials/publications-content.qmd >}}

## Projects

{{< include _partials/projects-content.qmd >}}

## Conferences

{{< include _partials/conferences-content.qmd >}}

## Service

{{< include _partials/service-content.qmd >}}
:::
